error_signature: Input Data Field Name not set to attachment_0
title: Incorrect Input Data Field Name for audio transcription
symptom: The workflow fails to process audio files correctly, resulting in an error related to the input data field name.
not_this_if: Input Data Field Name is already set to attachment_0
root_cause: The n8n-nodes-speech-transcribe node requires the input data field name to be specifically set to 'attachment_0' to correctly identify and process the binary audio file. If this is not set, the node cannot find the required data.
fix_steps: Change the 'Input Data Field Name' to 'attachment_0'
agent_instruction: Set the Input Data Field Name to 'attachment_0' in the n8n-nodes-speech-transcribe node.
